brief_sample.title: ParcelFlow renewal without a service-credit change
brief_sample.decision_question: Can we renew ParcelFlow without a service-credit change?
key_facts: ParcelFlow guarantees 99.5% monthly availability; service credits begin only when availability falls below 98.5%.
Measured availability was 98.9% in May and 99.1% in June.
conflicts_risks: ParcelFlow guarantees 99.5% monthly availability. Measured availability was 98.9% in May and 99.1% in June.
recommended_next_steps: Resolve the cited blocker before deciding: Vendor response is missing.

load_bearing_statements.statement: Hold: Vendor response is missing.

decision_rule: ACCEPT only when at least two reviewers, including one non-owner, rate the current-revision sample and the median usefulness score is at least 4/5.
review_instructions: Read every original source in source_set before rating its Brief.
Review the complete Brief: bottom line, key facts, conflicts/risks, missing evidence, and recommended next steps.
Rate 4 or 5 only when the Brief materially reduces decision-preparation work compared with reading the sources while preserving important nuance.
Use the same ten-Brief sample for every reviewer and explain concrete strengths or defects in the rationale.
